differential_diagnoses: Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) with nephrotic syndrome (secondary to chronic venous congestion)
next_steps: Perform spot urine protein/creatinine ratio and albumin/creatinine ratio
Order echocardiogram with strain imaging to evaluate for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Obtain cardiac MRI with gadolinium enhancement to assess for amyloid patterns
Perform ultrasound-guided kidney biopsy with Congo red staining, immunofluorescence, and electron microscopy
Perform bone marrow biopsy with flow cytometry and Congo red staining
Assess serum albumin, prealbumin, and comprehensive metabolic panel
